examples.suggested_resolution: Verify and stabilize the General issue (my laptop isnt working); assign to Facilities Management for root-cause remediation and confirm service recovery. Priority: Medium.
Verify and stabilize the general infrastructure issue (my food doesnt taste good); assign to Facilities Management for root-cause remediation and confirm service recovery. Priority: Medium.

examples.subject: Boiler failure – Building A heating
examples.details: Entire building without heating during cold snap.

examples.subject: Gas leak alarm triggered – Kitchen
examples.details: Gas leak sensor alarm in building kitchen area.
examples.final_resolution: Gas supply isolated; faulty valve replaced.

examples.subject: Chiller plant failure
examples.details: Building-wide cooling failure due to chiller breakdown.

examples.subject: Power outage – Finance floor
examples.details: Complete power failure affecting Finance department.
examples.final_resolution: Tripped MCB reset; UPS bypass engaged for continuity.

examples.subject: Server room overheating alert
examples.details: Temperature in server room exceeded 28°C threshold.
examples.final_resolution: Backup cooling unit activated; primary unit serviced.

examples.subject: Flooding – basement car park
examples.details: Heavy rain caused water ingress, risk to vehicles.
examples.final_resolution: Pumping crew deployed; drainage channel cleared.

examples.subject: HVAC unit failure in Block A
examples.details: Complete breakdown of HVAC unit. Office temperature unmanageable.
examples.final_resolution: Replaced compressor unit and recharged refrigerant.

examples.subject: Water leak from ceiling pipe
examples.details: Dripping water causing damage to office equipment.
examples.suggested_resolution: Seal pipe joint and replace panel.
examples.final_resolution: Pipe joint sealed and ceiling panel replaced.

examples.subject: Unauthorised vehicle in restricted bay
examples.details: Unknown vehicle parked in reserved emergency access bay.
examples.employee_resolution: Vehicle needed removal not just notice — contacted security supervisor.

examples.subject: Intruder alert – Roof access
examples.details: Motion detected on restricted rooftop area after hours.
